message:
fix(btree,core): add index seek bug test module and integrity check imports

Register the new index_seek_bug_test module in fsqlite-btree's lib.rs
to enable the test suite for index seek correctness verification.

Import integrity check types and functions from fsqlite-wal into
connection.rs to support database integrity verification at the
connection level, including:
- IntegrityCheckIssue, IntegrityCheckLevel, IntegrityCheckReport types
- Level 1-5 integrity check functions (page, btree, overflow chain,
  cross reference, schema)
- WalFecRepairEvidenceCard/Query/SeverityBucket for WAL FEC repair
- Helper utilities: is_valid_btree_page_type, merge_integrity_reports

Also imports read_varint from fsqlite-types and BTreePageType for
page type validation during integrity checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
